title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They have tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports that their credit card payment fails every time during checkout despite sufficient balance.

title: Order Not Showing in History
description: Customer completed a purchase but the order does not appear in their order history section.

title: Unable to Update Profile Information
description: Customer is unable to save updated phone number and address in profile settings.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation and promotional emails.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launching on Android devices.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Customer reports that the provided discount code shows as invalid during checkout.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer experiences significant delays when navigating between pages.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer does not receive OTP code required for two-factor authentication login.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer returned an item but refund has not been credited to their account.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Attempts
description: Customer account was locked after multiple failed login attempts and cannot be unlocked.

title: Image Upload Fails
description: Customer cannot upload profile picture; system shows 'Upload Failed' error.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer attempted to cancel subscription but billing continues.

title: Incorrect Invoice Amount
description: Customer received an invoice with incorrect pricing details.
